servinfo.title: Front Drive Shaft Disassembly and Reassembly

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Drive Shaft Assembly Removal and Installation:Front

item.ptxt: Disassembly of wheel side joint is not allowed. If any noise or damage exists in wheel side joint, replace the joint as assembly.
Do not disassemble tripod joint. If any malcondition is found in tripod joint, replace tripod joint assembly.

topic.title: Differential side joint and/or transfer side joint

s1.ptxt: Remove boot big bands (1) of differential side boot and/or intermediate shaft side boot.
Remove differential side joint housing and/or transfer side joint housing from tripod joint.
Wipe off grease from shaft and take off snap ring (1) using snap ring pliers (2).
Remove tripod joint (1) using 3-arm puller (2).

attention2.ptxt: To prevent any problem caused by washing solution, do not wash tripod joint except its housing. Degreasing of tripod joint with shop cloth is allowed.

s1.ptxt: Remove boot small bands (1) of differential side boot and/or transfer side boot.
Pull out differential side boot and/or transfer side boot from shaft.
Remove damper from right side drive shaft, if equipped.
Remove boot big band of wheel side as follows.

s2.ptxt: Use flat-bladed screwdriver (1) or the like to undo caulking (2) of wheel side boot small band (3) and big band (4), and then pull out wheel side boot from shaft.

servinfosub.title: Reassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Judging from abnormality noted before disassembly and what is found through visual check of component parts after disassembly, prepare replacing parts and proceed to reassembly.
Make sure that wheel side joint assembly (1) and housing of tripod joint (2) are washed thoroughly and air dried.

item.ptxt: To prevent any problem caused by washing solution, do not wash tripod joint except its housing. It is acceptable to use a shop cloth to degrease tripod joint.
Degreasing of tripod joint with shop cloth is allowed.
Do not wash boots in degreaser such as gasoline or kerosene, etc. Washing in degreaser causes boot deterioration.
To ensure full performance of joint as originally designed, apply the specified amount of grease to respective joint according to the following procedure.

s1.ptxt: Wash disassembled parts (except boots). After washing parts, air dry them completely.
Clean boots with shop cloth.
Apply grease from the service kit to wheel side joint.
Install wheel side boot on shaft.
Fill boot inside with specified grease.
Insert flat-bladed screwdriver into boot (1) and allow air to enter boot so that air pressure in boot becomes the same as the atmospheric pressure.
Place boot big band (3) and small band (4) onto wheel side boot so that outer end (1) of each band faces in forward rotating direction (2) as shown in figure.

item.ptxt: Be sure to use new boot bands.
Do not squeeze or distort boot when fastening boot with boot bands. Squeezing boot to force air out may distort boot and reduce its durability.

s1.ptxt: Fasten boot band noting the following point.

attention2.ptxt: Do not squeeze or distort boot when fastening boot with boot bands. Squeezing boot to force air out may distort boot and reduce its durability.

s2.ptxt: Fasten boot small band (1) and boot big band (2) using special tool as shown in figure.

topic.title: Differential side joint and/or transfer side joint

s1.ptxt: Wash disassembled parts (except boots). After washing parts, air dry them completely.
Clean boots with shop cloth.
For right side drive shaft, install damper (1) to specified position on drive shaft, if removed.

spec.title: Drive shaft damper installing position (right side)

s1.ptxt: Install differential side boot and/or transfer side boot on shaft.
Install tripod joint (1) on shaft using special tool with hammer, directing its chamfered spline (3) toward wheel side, and then fasten tripod joint with new snap ring (2) using snap ring pliers (4).
Apply grease including in service kit supplied as spare parts to tripod joint (1) and boot.

spec.title: Grease specification for front drive shaft differential side and transfer side joint

s1.ptxt: Fit boot (1) to grooves of shaft and differential side joint housing (2) and/or transfer side joint housing (3).
Insert flat-bladed screwdriver or the like into boot (1) and allow air to enter boot so that air pressure in boot becomes the same as atmospheric pressure.

spec.title: Drive shaft boot fixing position (distance between joint end and boot small band center)

entry.ptxt: Drive shaft inserted into differential side
Drive shaft inserted into transfer side

s1.ptxt: Place boot big band and small band onto differential side boot and/or transfer side boot so that band end (1) bends against forward rotation (a).

item.ptxt: Be sure to use new boot bands.
Do not squeeze or distort boot when fastening boot with boot bands. Squeezing boot to force air out may distort boot and reduce its durability.

s1.ptxt: Fasten boot big band and small band as shown in figure.
